title: TagDescriptor
description: Schema defining the structure of metadata tag descriptors for ExifTool-RS. Each TagDescriptor represents a single metadata tag definition that will be code-generated into the Rust tag registry.

tag_id.description: Unique identifier for the tag. Can be a numeric ID (e.g., 0x010F for EXIF tags) or a string ID (e.g., 'XMP-dc:Creator' for XMP tags).

tag_name.description: Full canonical name of the tag (e.g., 'EXIF:Make', 'XMP-dc:Creator'). This serves as the primary key for tag lookups.

format_family.description: Metadata format family to which this tag belongs.

writable.description: Indicates whether this tag can be written back to the file metadata.

value_type.description: Data type of the tag's value, corresponding to TagValue enum variants in Rust.

description.description: Human-readable description of the tag's purpose and meaning.

example_values.description: Array of example values demonstrating typical content for this tag.

examples.description: Creator or author of the document
Indicates whether the latitude is north or south latitude
